prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A soft break of pale gold light glows low behind a dark hill while warm light falls across a cream robe on the cross; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
The crucified Christ is set on a rough wooden cross from a respectful middle distance, arms outstretched along the beam, body robed in a soiled cream garment, his head gently inclined. A soft break of pale gold light widens behind the dark hill; the small mockers are at the lower-left and a heap of stripped garments lies at the foot of the cross. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the crucified Christ on the cross against the soft light.

Cut to mid framing — the upper body and gently inclined head.

Cut to close-up — the inclined, peaceful face.

Cut to insert — an outstretched nailed hand along the beam.

Cut to insert — the nailed bare feet on the wooden block.

Cut to lower framing — the heap of stripped garments at the foot.

Cut to upper framing — the soft gold break of light behind the dark hill.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the crucified Christ against the fading light.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Willing, finished love.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

Cut to close-up — the inclined, peaceful face
Cut to insert — outstretched nailed hand along the beam

Cut to lower framing — heap of stripped garments at the foot
Cut to upper framing — soft gold break of light behind the dark hill
Return to full composition, end hold on the crucified Christ against the fading light
